title: Give your fingerprints and photo at the Embassy of Canada in Havana - Canada.ca
content:
## Give your fingerprints and photo at the Embassy of Canada in Havana
If you’re in Cuba, you may give your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) at the Embassy of Canada in Havana. There are no visa application centres (VACs) in Cuba.

## How to give your biometrics
To give your biometrics at the Embassy of Canada in Havana, Cuba, email the embassy to make an appointment and wait until you get your confirmation. The embassy will not accept walk-in requests.
You must bring the following documents to your appointment:
- your biometrics instruction letter

## Where to give your biometrics
Embassy of Canada in Havana
Immigration Section 518 (esq. 7ma) Calle 30 La Habana, Cuba
